Grid scale failure

summary: The generation is a complete structural failure. Instead of creating a 4x4 grid with one 64x64 sprite per slot, the model generated a dense collage of dozens of tiny icons across the entire canvas. Furthermore, it hallucinated completely unrelated items (jewelry like rings, necklaces, and gem bags) starting from the middle of the image. Every single slot fails.
